skipped.reason: 33 PRs skipped (SHA unchanged since last review); 176 new candidates all had human review activity (reviews or comments > 0); 44 drafts excluded

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit)
Do NOT include auto-close keywords (fixes #N, closes #N) in commit messages
Approval style is warm and brief: 🎉 thanks! is the standard merge acknowledgment
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — does not indicate human review
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need
Frontend: fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing with eslint-disable
Backend (Go): use comma-ok type assertions to avoid panics; structured logging via slog
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker in kubernetes-sigs repos
k8s-ci-robot posts IssueComment (not Review) — does not count as human review
@illume reviews PRs very quickly; essentially all new PRs have human review by run time
